releases.title: What's New
changes: Added Customer Name to timesheet

releases.title: Auto-updates & What's New
changes: Automatic updates — the app now checks for new versions on startup and installs updates in the background
New What's New screen displays improvements and new features after each update
Job sheets now save with readable IDs such as JS-01-06-2026-001
Redesigned modals, sidebar, splash screen, and overall interface styling
Added Job Sheet document type for tracking jobs, customers, payment status, and descriptions
Added Time Sheet document type with automatic total hours calculation
Added dedicated Job Sheet save and load system with persistent storage
Job Sheets can now be reopened and edited across sessions
Time Sheets now persist independently and support multi-row time tracking
Improved customer management system with full create, edit, and delete functionality
Customer records can be quickly selected and injected into documents
Added duplicate-name protection when saving customers
Improved document switching between Invoice, Quote, Job Sheet, and Time Sheet modes
Refactored document template system for faster and cleaner switching between layouts
Improved PDF generation across all document types including layout consistency and scaling fixes
Added dynamic PDF filenames based on document type, customer, and reference fields
Improved invoice payment handling and visual payment status indicators
Added automatic date population across all templates and document types
Improved global application state handling for active document and current job sheet
Improved modal workflows for loading and selecting saved job sheets
Added job sheet picker for browsing and reopening previous records
Improved UI feedback system with consistent toast notifications across modules
Improved window controls (minimize, maximize, close) stability and behaviour
Optimised rendering performance for large job and time sheet tables
Fixed multiple module import/export inconsistencies across UI, template, and job system
Resolved issues with broken UI function imports after module refactor
General codebase cleanup and improved file separation across modules
Various bug fixes and stability improvements throughout the application

releases.title: Initial Release
changes: Initial release of Chris Murphy Work Templates Save as PDF Application
